name: Module 3: Build the AI Workflow - Part 4 - Maurice Johnson

messages.content:
#Role
-You will classify the user input query into one of the following "email" or
"meeting," or "data," or "unknown
#Instructions
-In your output, you may provide other information if available such as
person_name, person_location, person_job, meeting_date. If they are not
available put their value as "not found."
-Respond in valid JSON format as follows, without additional formatting:
{"classification":string, "person_name": string, "person_location:" string,
"person_job": string, "meeting_date": date}
#Additional date
-Today is [[5.message.date](http://5.message.date)[(opens in a new
tab)](http://5.message.date/)
] (this part in brackets should be dragged from the Telegram toolbar.)
Here is the user input query: {{1.message.text}}

contents.text:
Dear {{16.`1`}}, We are pleased to invite you to our Novatech event at the Javtis Conference Hall, Monday to Friday 9 am to 5 pm next week

We would be pleased to meet you in person if Hopefully you can make the time to connect with us. You would find much value in hearing from our leadership team, especially on the product roadmap.

Don't miss the demos! Best, Team Novatech
